heading: Access to Theodore Roosevelt Island
label: 9303 Access to Theodore Roosevelt Island
text: Subject to the approval of the National Capital Planning Commission and the availability of appropriations, the Director of the National Park Service may provide suitable means of access to and on Theodore Roosevelt Island.
